[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111110 6
1 0110001 3
2 1000110 3
3 0100110 3
4 1011110 5
5 1001101 4
6 0011110 4
7 0100000 1

23 32 0100000 1 match 7

70 07 1001100 3
